title: CatBoost correction weight 0.15
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.15 as an upper-bound fixed blend test.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the final CatBoost blend weight to 0.15: final = 0.85 * realmlp_core + 0.15 * catboost_pred. Keep validation and outputs unchanged.
expected_effect: Determine whether higher CatBoost weights should be ruled out.
risk: This may be beyond the useful correction range and hurt both CV and public.
